evolution_logs.correction: Renamed 'PROJECT' to 'Project', unified 'Registry', and removed redundant 'New Project' entry.
Created 'Infra Center' page and established its C-position at the top of the Sidebar.
Added /api/asf/infra/info to connect UI with persistent Soul & State files.
Analyzed 6 core classes: CoPawAgent, ASFFactory, ASFProjectManager, ModelFactory, SoftwareFactory, EventStore. Identified critical gaps in persistence, template support, and agent marketplace.
